titleStmt.title: SII 16.19: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 19. (A.R. No. 319 of 1922.) TAṀBAḶḶAPALLE, MADANAPALLE TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Mallikārjuna temple on Mallayyakoṇḍa to the east of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1328, Vyaya, Vaiśākha śu. 1, Monday, corresponding to 1406 A.D., April 19, °57.

It records the gift of cows, land by purchase for three flower-gardens, a lamp a disk bell etc., to God Mallikārjuna of Chandragiri by Peda Laki-nāyiḍu, Pina Avubaḷināyiḍu and Bālagōpi-nāyiḍu, sons of Mahānāyaṅkāchārya Kāmu Dōrapanāyiḍu, the servant of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Dēvarāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1328 Āgunēṭi vyayasaṁvatsara vayiśāka
su 1 sō śrīmānmahāmaṁḍalēśvara śrīvī
ra dēvarāyamahārāyanikiṁ nijabhrityu
layina śrīmanmahānāyaṁkācā¨ryya ma
reyōkaḍekāvapāla veṁkali kulamunaṁdu
prasiddhamayina kāmu dōrapanāyanikiṁni
bujavanāyaṁkurālikiṁni suputrulayi
na pedalakināyaḍu pinaAvubaḷināyiḍu
bālagōpināyiḍu yi nāyaṁkulu ca
ṁdragiri malikā¨rjunadēvaraku kilāruku pasu
lā peṭitimi pūjaku nēlagoni mūḍu pu
ṣpālatōṁṭalu peṭitimi majanānakuṁ
nu paruśakuṁnu payiṁḍiveṭi vudakālaku
mūḍuguṁḍālu cē(ṁ)yiṁ stimi gōpinā
yaḍu kalaṁta gālamu muṭiṁcumani dīpakaṁbaṁ
peṭitimi jēṁgaṁṭa peṭtimi Āruvāṁḍlavāruṁnu
dēvaruku sama¨rppiṁcuvāru nemu yi stānamunu
puramuṁnu stānikulānu mā yaṁtavaṭuvāriki
pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁgā sa¨rvvamānyamugā maṁniṁstimi yi
daṁ¨rmamu sēsina nāyaṁkulakun vīri peddala
kuṁnu Ācaṁdrā¨rkastāhigānu Ānēka saṁpada
lu caṁdragiri mallikārjunadēvara yicci rakṣiṁ
cunu . maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.19 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
